message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "protection": "Clear definition of intellectual property rights",
      "why_missing": "The contract does not specify who owns the intellectual property rights to the software developed.",
      "risk": "Potential disputes over ownership and usage rights of the developed software could arise, leading to legal complications.",
      "mitigation": "Include a clause that clearly defines the ownership of intellectual property rights for the software and any related materials.",
      "suggested_clause": "All intellectual property rights in the software developed under this Agreement shall be owned by [Company/Developer]. Developer grants Company a perpetual, royalty-free license to use, modify, and distribute the software.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "protection": "Limitation of liability",
      "why_missing": "There is no clause limiting the liability of either party in case of damages arising from the contract.",
      "risk": "Without a limitation of liability clause, either party could be exposed to significant financial losses due to unforeseen circumstances.",
      "mitigation": "Add a clause that limits the liability of both parties to a certain amount, typically the total fees paid under the contract.",
      "suggested_clause": "Neither party shall be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising out of this Agreement. The total liability of either party shall not exceed the total fees paid under this Agreement.",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "protection": "Dispute resolution mechanism",
      "why_missing": "The contract lacks a clear process for resolving disputes that may arise between the parties.",
      "risk": "In the event of a disagreement, the absence of a dispute resolution mechanism could lead to prolonged conflicts and litigation.",
      "mitigation": "Incorporate a clause that outlines the steps for dispute resolution, including mediation and arbitration.",
      "suggested_clause": "In the event of any dispute arising out of or relating to this Agreement, the parties agree to first attempt to resolve the dispute through mediation. If mediation fails, the dispute shall be settled by binding arbitration in accordance with the rules of [Arbitration Institution].",
      "confidence": 0.8
    },
    {
      "protection": "Confidentiality obligations",
      "why_missing": "There is no confidentiality clause to protect sensitive information exchanged during the project.",
      "risk": "Sensitive business information could be disclosed or misused, leading to competitive disadvantages.",
      "mitigation": "Include a confidentiality clause that obligates both parties to protect each other's confidential information.",
      "suggested_clause": "Both parties agree to keep confidential all proprietary information disclosed during the term of this Agreement and shall not disclose such information to any third party without prior written consent.",
      "confidence": 0.9
    },
    {
      "protection": "Termination rights",
      "why_missing": "The contract does not specify the conditions under which either party can terminate the agreement.",
      "risk": "Without clear termination rights, parties may be stuck in an unfavorable contract situation.",
      "mitigation": "Add a clause that outlines the conditions under which either party may terminate the agreement.",
      "suggested_clause": "Either party may terminate this Agreement upon [number] days written notice if the other party breaches any material term of this Agreement and fails to cure such breach within that notice period.",
      "confidence": 0.75
    }
  ]
}
